common_evaluation_design: Cross-site comparison or quantified site signatures
common_limitation: Target sites may be used repeatedly or shift source remains partly unobserved
what_this_study_adds: A development-to-reserved-hospital reversal under a locked protocol
remaining_gap: No causal center-2 shift analysis and no non-Camelyon cohort
caveat: Empirical protocol contribution, not a new shift metric

common_evaluation_design: Standardized multi-hospital challenge or benchmark split
common_limitation: Benchmark use alone does not prevent project-level reuse of a development OOD site
what_this_study_adds: Durable separation of development center 1 from one-shot final center 2
caveat: Uses an existing benchmark and fixed split

common_evaluation_design: Worst-group optimization using known training groups
common_limitation: Observed groups may not represent the future domain and model selection can dominate
what_this_study_adds: Predeclared matched ERM control and honest negative final comparison
remaining_gap: No CORAL, DANN, or broader DG benchmark

common_evaluation_design: Fit post-hoc calibration and evaluate in-domain or under benchmark shifts
common_limitation: Calibration may be refit or assessed on data that informed development
what_this_study_adds: Frozen temperatures applied to a separately reserved hospital without refitting
remaining_gap: Only two models and one target hospital
caveat: No new calibration method and no universal validity claim

common_limitation: Confidence-based policies may not transport under shift
what_this_study_adds: High-confidence false-negative audit at prespecified confidence levels
remaining_gap: No validated abstention system or coverage policy
caveat: Audit only; not a selective-classification method

common_limitation: External data can still influence repeated model and policy choices
what_this_study_adds: One-shot authorization, predeclared roles, frozen policies, and durable run state
remaining_gap: Retrospective patch-level benchmark rather than prospective validation
caveat: Novelty is governance plus empirical reversal

common_limitation: Thresholds are often chosen and assessed within one population
what_this_study_adds: Fourteen id_val-selected thresholds applied unchanged to the reserved hospital
remaining_gap: No clinical utility or site-specific threshold validation

common_evaluation_design: Whole-slide aggregation, reader studies, or workflow validation
common_limitation: Patch-level models do not establish clinical performance
what_this_study_adds: Explicitly bounds claims and exposes patch-level reliability failure
remaining_gap: No WSI, patient, reader, or prospective endpoint
caveat: Novelty does not extend to clinical translation
